Segunda División

| Relegated | [Racing Ferrol](/wiki/Racing_de_Ferrol "Racing de Ferrol") [Cádiz](/wiki/C%C3%A1diz_CF "Cádiz CF") [Granada 74](/wiki/Granada_74_CF "Granada 74 CF") [Polideportivo Ejido](/wiki/Polideportivo_Ejido "Polideportivo Ejido") |

| ← [2006–07](/wiki/2006%E2%80%9307_Segunda_Divisi%C3%B3n "2006–07 Segunda División")  [2008–09](/wiki/2008%E2%80%9309_Segunda_Divisi%C3%B3n "2008–09 Segunda División") → | |

The 2007–08 season was the 77th in the history of the [Segunda División](/wiki/Segunda_Divisi%C3%B3n "Segunda División") (known as the Liga [BBVA](/wiki/BBVA "BBVA") for sponsorship reasons), the second tier of the [Spanish football league system](/wiki/Spanish_football_league_system "Spanish football league system"). The first matches of the season were played on 25 August 2007, and the season ended on 15 June 2008. [Celta de Vigo](/wiki/Celta_de_Vigo "Celta de Vigo"), [Real Sociedad](/wiki/Real_Sociedad "Real Sociedad"), and [Gimnàstic de Tarragona](/wiki/Gimn%C3%A0stic_de_Tarragona "Gimnàstic de Tarragona") were the teams which were relegated from [La Liga](/wiki/La_Liga "La Liga") the previous season. [Racing de Ferrol](/wiki/Racing_de_Ferrol "Racing de Ferrol"), [Eibar](/wiki/SD_Eibar "SD Eibar"), [Sevilla Atlético](/wiki/Sevilla_Atl%C3%A9tico "Sevilla Atlético"), and [Córdoba](/wiki/C%C3%B3rdoba_CF "Córdoba CF") were the teams which were promoted from [Segunda División B](/wiki/Segunda_Divisi%C3%B3n_B "Segunda División B") the previous season.

The first goal of the season was scored by [Joseba del Olmo](/wiki/Joseba_del_Olmo "Joseba del Olmo"), who scored an 18th-minute goal for [Eibar](/wiki/SD_Eibar "SD Eibar") against [Racing de Ferrol](/wiki/Racing_de_Ferrol "Racing de Ferrol") in the early kick-off. The first [red card](/wiki/Red_card_(sports) "Red card (sports)") of the competition was given to [Miguel Cobas](/wiki/Miguel_Cobas "Miguel Cobas") of [Las Palmas](/wiki/UD_Las_Palmas "UD Las Palmas") after a challenge on [Numancia](/wiki/CD_Numancia "CD Numancia")'s [Gorka Brit](/wiki/Gorka_Brit "Gorka Brit"). The first [hat-trick](/wiki/Hat-trick "Hat-trick") was scored by [Yordi](/wiki/Yordi "Yordi") in the match between [Xerez](/wiki/Xerez_CD "Xerez CD") and [Hércules](/wiki/H%C3%A9rcules_CF "Hércules CF").

### Scoring

  + *[Sporting Gijón](/wiki/Sporting_de_Gij%C3%B3n "Sporting de Gijón") 4–0 [Polideportivo Ejido](/wiki/Polideportivo_Ejido "Polideportivo Ejido") (26 August 2007)*
  + *[Real Sociedad](/wiki/Real_Sociedad "Real Sociedad") 4–0 [Las Palmas](/wiki/UD_Las_Palmas "UD Las Palmas") (17 February 2008)*
  + *[Eibar](/wiki/SD_Eibar "SD Eibar") 4–0 [Tenerife](/wiki/CD_Tenerife "CD Tenerife") (22 March 2008)*
  + *[Hércules](/wiki/H%C3%A9rcules_CF "Hércules CF") 5–1 [Eibar](/wiki/SD_Eibar "SD Eibar") (26 April 2008)*

* First [hat-trick](/wiki/Hat-trick "Hat-trick") of the season: [Yordi](/wiki/Yordi "Yordi") for [Xerez](/wiki/Xerez_CD "Xerez CD") against [Hércules](/wiki/H%C3%A9rcules_CF "Hércules CF") (27 January 2008)
* First [own goal](/wiki/Own_goal "Own goal") of the season: [Jordi Ferrón](/wiki/Jordi_Ferr%C3%B3n "Jordi Ferrón") for [Hércules](/wiki/H%C3%A9rcules_CF "Hércules CF") against [Albacete](/wiki/Albacete_Balompi%C3%A9 "Albacete Balompié") (9 September 2007)
* Most goals by one player in a single match: ***3***

  + *[Asier Goiria](/wiki/Asier_Goiria "Asier Goiria") for [Eibar](/wiki/SD_Eibar "SD Eibar") against [Tenerife](/wiki/CD_Tenerife "CD Tenerife") (22 March 2008)*
  + *[Antonio Hidalgo](/wiki/Antonio_Hidalgo_Morilla "Antonio Hidalgo Morilla") for [Málaga](/wiki/M%C3%A1laga_CF "Málaga CF") against [Hércules](/wiki/H%C3%A9rcules_CF "Hércules CF") (18 May 2008)*
* Most goals by one team in a match: **6** – *[Málaga](/wiki/M%C3%A1laga_CF "Málaga CF") 4–6 [Hércules](/wiki/H%C3%A9rcules_CF "Hércules CF") (18 May 2008)*
* Most goals in one half by one team: **5** – *[Málaga](/wiki/M%C3%A1laga_CF "Málaga CF") 4–6 [Hércules](/wiki/H%C3%A9rcules_CF "Hércules CF") (18 May 2008)*
* Most goals scored by losing team: **4** – *[Málaga](/wiki/M%C3%A1laga_CF "Málaga CF") 4–6 [Hércules](/wiki/H%C3%A9rcules_CF "Hércules CF") (18 May 2008)*
